human_verification.notes: Reviewed NERC-specific boundaries, registration and applicability posture, CMEP and Align evidence handling, scenario-to-ability coverage, and refusal of legal, regulator-facing, engineering, cybersecurity, and formal signoff authority.

review_notes: All required scenario families for the issue and cross-industry research contract are covered and mapped to passing results.
All required functional abilities for compliance-controls-and-governance plus cross-industry are represented and validated.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary controls restrict the lane to NERC-specific compliance mapping, evidence readiness, review preparation, exception handling, and escalation for registered entities in electric power and generation.

Authority sources cover FERC reliability context, NERC registration and CMEP governance, internal-control assessment, Align and SEL workflows, periodic data submittals, and NERC terminology with refresh and decay rules.
Scenario coverage includes missing evidence, conflicting source interpretation, legal or signoff refusal, adjacent-lane routing, operational-practice conflict, and tenant fact gaps.
Runtime remains specification-based with explicit requirements for any later retained-implementation promotion.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; regional-entity and tenant-specific differences are explicitly handled through retrieval and escalation rules.
This package is ready for validated operations under specification-based execution controls.
